parsed_review.summary: PASS — CP00-485 (governance core P02 workflow permission slice, RP16.P02.M04.S19–RP16.P02.M06.S14, risk B, 40 units) is a clean descriptor-only pack with no findings. Source inspection via Read/Grep/Glob confirms: (1) Coverage matches the plan exactly — micro split 4/22/14 across M04/M05/M06 and deliverable split test 8 / contract 2 / implementation 17 / security_audit 4 / ui 5 / claude_review 2 / failure_recovery 2, consistent across closeout-pack-plan.json, manifest.json, review-baseline.json, registry.js binding, and the contract's current_pack/historical_pack_bindings. (2) Descriptor-only boundary preserved: every CP485 result in service.js is frozen with the full no-write/no-real-data attestation (runtime/write/storage/audit/lock/fixture flags all false; synthetic_only and no_real_data true); grep found no write-violation flags set true, no leak markers, no TODO/FIXME/stubs. (3) Authority boundary intact: descriptors and GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP485_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION set claude_is_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; review-request is read_only with only Read/Grep/Glob; Hermes appears solely as deterministic evidence-packet/receipt descriptors (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. (4) production_ready is correctly false/'implemented_pending_review' — the *_verified flag is a descriptor-verification label and Hermes production_ready_candidate is a deterministic coverage.valid && slice.valid check, so there is no enterprise-trust over-claim; final closeout properly pends this review plus human approval. (5) validators.js, test/model.test.js (deepEqual against the contract), the contract sections, and README §CP00-485 are mutually consistent and all reference CP00-485. (6) Review-evidence hardening checks pass: readiness auth-preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1443-byte valid JSON result, no auth failure/0-byte/malformed/fenced/tool-call-shaped output), validation-report shows no forbidden tools, source-inspection mode used, and no active untracked implementation files omitted. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook docs, .docx, LDIP invalid-attempt) are correctly scoped out and were not treated as part of the pack. Reported validation commands all record exit_code 0; as a read-only independent reviewer (not final approver) I confirm the static evidence supports the descriptor-verification claim. No P0/P1/P2/P3 issues.
